case_title: GMJ STRATEGY VS. DAVID M. SCHMITT DRYWALL & INTERIOR SYSTEMS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,600.00 FILED BY GMJ STRATEGY AS TO DEFENDANT DAVID M. SCHMITT DRYWALL & INTERIOR SYSTEMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-20-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GMJ STRATEGY
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE GRANTED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-20-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT VIA COURTCALL, REPRESENTED BY DIMITRI DIMITRIADES--DIRECTOR OF OPERATIONS. DEFENDANT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GMJ STRATEGY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVID M. SCHMITT DRYWALL & INTERIOR SYSTEMS $3,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,705.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2016 ORDERED DESTROYED
